# Ultima IV dungeon: destard
# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — 8 levels of 8x8 (nibble-coded), then the room-data block.
# format: ascii-dungeon v1  size=8 levels=8
# legend (char  hex  kind):
#   ~  00  corridor
#   !  10  ladder_up
#   $  20  ladder_down
#   %  30  ladder_both
#   &  40  chest
#   '  70  fountain
#   (  80  field
#   )  92  room_2
#   *  93  room_3
#   +  b0  door_special
#   ,  c0  kind_c
#   -  d0  door
#   .  d1  door_1
#   /  d2  door_2
#   0  d3  door_3
#   1  d4  door_4
#   2  d5  door_5
#   3  d6  door_6
#   4  d7  door_7
#   5  d8  door_8
#   6  d9  door_9
#   7  da  door_a
#   8  db  door_b
#   9  dc  door_c
#   :  dd  door_d
#   ;  de  door_e
#   <  df  door_f
#   =  e0  room_marker
#   F  f0  wall
#
== level 0 ==
|F~F=FFF=|
|~!~~~~~~|
|F~F=FFF=|
|=~=$F-F$|
|F~FFF~FF|
|F~F0~$~.|
|F~FFF~FF|
|=~=$F/F$|
== level 1 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|F$1~,~~)|
|F2F~FFFF|
|F~~!~~~!|
|F,F~FFF~|
|F~F~F%F~|
|F~F~FFF~|
|F*F!~~~!|
== level 2 ==
|FFF~FFFF|
|F!~3~~~$|
|FFF~FFFF|
|F'F~F&~~|
|,~,~FFF~|
|FFFFF%FF|
|~~~~FFF~|
|F'F~F&~~|
== level 3 ==
|F&FFF&FF|
|F&&&F&F!|
|FFF&F&F~|
|~~F&&&F~|
|F~FFFFFF|
|~4&&F%F~|
|F&F&FFF~|
|F&F&&&F$|
== level 4 ==
|F~FFFFFF|
|~~~~F$~~|
|F~5~FFFF|
|F~~~~~~~|
|FFF~FFF~|
|F$F~F%F~|
|F~F~FFF~|
|F~F~~~~!|
== level 5 ==
|F7F~F~F~|
|FFF(~!~(|
|F6F~F~F~|
|F~F(~(~'|
|F~FFFFFF|
|~!~$F%F$|
|F~FFFFFF|
|F~F'~(~(|
== level 6 ==
|FFFFFFF,|
|F~8~~~F~|
|F~F~F~F~|
|F~F~~$F~|
|F~FFFFF~|
|F~~!F%F!|
|FFFFFFF,|
|,~~+~~,~|
== level 7 ==
|F~,~F~FF|
|F~:~F~~~|
|F~,~FFF~|
|F~;~~!F~|
|F~~~F=F~|
|FFFFF!F~|
|F~~~FFF~|
|F~9~=~F<|
# crc32: 51dc0ca8
# room-data block (4096 bytes) — verbatim hex, edit only when you know the room format:
